title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Lobatse Town Council (cemetery) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Lobatse Town Council (cemetery) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Lobatse Town Council (Cemetery) Bye-laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Establishment
provisions.content:
3. Establishment
Each of the areas specified in the First Schedule is hereby established as a cemetery.

provisions.title: Burials outside cemetery
provisions.content:
4. Burials outside cemetery
No person shall bury or cause to be buried a body in any place other than in a cemetery.

definitions.definition: the person designated by the Town Council as the caretaker of a particular cemetery
an area established as a cemetery by bye-law 3
a person under 10 years of age
any gravestone, monument, cenotaph, tablet or monumental inscription and any work ancillary thereto
the Town Clerk of the Lobatse Town Council
